texto: She was right. After all, if she herself had wondered whether she was Indian enough -- she, who had always been to me a sort of epitome of Indian -- then who could be? Who could claim the sole right or way to an identity?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Tanuja Desai Hidier que provoca temas ligados a autoestima. Ao questionar “She was right. After all, if she herself had wondered whether she was Indian enough -- she, who h…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre autoestima, bicultural, identity, com foco em identity.
